pdf_extraction.description: Iterates through PDF pages and extracts raw text content.

image_ocr.description: Performs Optical Character Recognition (OCR) on PNG, JPG, and JPEG files to convert images to text.

steps: Trigger scrape task for a specific LinkedIn URL
Poll or fetch the scraped dataset result
Handle authentication (Bearer Token) and API errors

matching_logic: Lowercase normalization of all input text.
Keyword matching against the skill database for Resume, LinkedIn Profile, and Job Description.
Merging of Resume and LinkedIn skills to create a comprehensive 'Candidate Profile'.

scoring_metrics.match_score: Percentage of skills requested in the Job Description that are found in the Candidate Profile.
scoring_metrics.resume_score: (Resume Skill Count * 10) + LinkedIn Bonus (unique LinkedIn skills * 5, capped at 20).

profile_optimization: Checks if skill count is below threshold (5).
skill_gap_analysis: Identifies skills present in the Job Description but missing from the Candidate Profile.
Suggests adding these specific missing skills to the LinkedIn profile.

frontend_integration.dynamic_views: Single-page style layout controlled via JavaScript (landing-view, input-view, result-view).

visuals: Radar Chart for skill proficiency (simulated data)
Conditional rendering for LinkedIn profile data and errors

user_experience: Loading overlay during asynchronous backend processing.
Responsive layout for mobile and desktop.
